en.title: Best Smart Speakers 2026
en.description: The top smart speakers ranked by sound quality, AI assistant capability, and smart home integration, from budget picks to premium audiophile choices.

zh-tw.title: 最佳智慧音箱 2026
zh-tw.description: 從入門到旗艦，按音質、AI 助理能力與智慧家居整合全面評比，幫你找到最適合自己生態系的智慧音箱。

en.description: Amazon's flagship Alexa speaker with Dolby Atmos, a built-in Zigbee/Matter hub, and Alexa+ AI for a deeply connected smart home.

zh-tw.description: Amazon 旗艦喇叭，支援 Dolby Atmos 立體聲場、內建 Zigbee/Matter 智慧家居主控中樞，搭配 Alexa+ AI，是全家亞馬遜生態的指揮核心。

en.description: The best-sounding compact smart speaker at its price, with Alexa, Sonos Voice Control, and AirPlay 2 built in — no ecosystem lock-in required.

zh-tw.description: 同價位音質最好的智慧喇叭，內建 Alexa、Sonos Voice Control 和 AirPlay 2，不綁生態系，買了就能用。

en.description: The go-to smart speaker for iPhone and Apple TV households, delivering room-filling Spatial Audio and tight HomeKit integration in a compact cylindrical design.

zh-tw.description: iPhone 家庭的首選智慧喇叭，空間音訊渾厚有質感，HomeKit 整合無縫，擺在客廳直接就是蘋果智慧家居的核心樞紐。

en.description: Sonos's spatial audio flagship packs six drivers tuned for Dolby Atmos height effects, making it the most immersive single-box smart speaker available.

zh-tw.description: Sonos 空間音訊旗艦，六顆驅動單體專為 Dolby Atmos 高空聲場調音，單顆喇叭能帶出的立體感目前市場找不到對手。

en.description: Google's first speaker built specifically around Gemini, with 360-degree sound and a natural Gemini Live conversational mode for hands-free home control.

zh-tw.description: Google 首款以 Gemini AI 為核心打造的智慧音箱，360 度全向音場加上 Gemini Live 對話模式，對著它說話像在跟真人助理溝通。

en.description: A 270W retro-styled powerhouse that runs Alexa and Google Assistant simultaneously, built for listeners who want serious room-shaking output and refuse to pick one ecosystem.

zh-tw.description: 270W 旗艦輸出功率、Alexa 加 Google Assistant 同時運作，復古鋁製提把外殼兼顧設計感，不想選邊站的用戶唯一選項。

en.description: The mid-range Alexa workhorse with a built-in Zigbee and Matter smart home hub, adaptive EQ, and solid spherical design that fits any room.

zh-tw.description: 亞馬遜中階主力款，內建 Zigbee 和 Matter 智慧家居主控，自適應 EQ 自動調音，球形外觀放哪個角落都不違和。

en.description: The most approachable entry into the Alexa ecosystem at $50, with a motion sensor, temperature sensor, and surprisingly full bass for a speaker this compact.

zh-tw.description: 五十美金入手 Alexa 生態最低門檻，內建動作感測器和溫度感測器，這個價位能有這種低頻，真的說得過去。

en.description: Apple's compact and affordable smart speaker with 360-degree audio, intercom support across Apple devices, and seamless handoff for iPhone users.

zh-tw.description: 蘋果入門智慧喇叭，360 度音場設計、跨裝置對講、iPhone 無縫接力，NT$2,999 是進入蘋果智慧家居最低的門檻。

references.title: The 5 Best Smart Speakers of 2026
Best smart speakers 2026: Reviews and buying advice
Best smart speakers in 2026 — Alexa, Google, and Siri tested
Amazon Echo Studio (2025) review
Sonos Era 300 Review: Still Worth It in 2026?
Google Home Speaker with Gemini coming Spring 2026
JBL Authentics 500 review

en.commentary:
I've been tracking smart speakers closely through the first quarter of 2026, and the market is at an inflection point. Amazon's Alexa+ upgrade and Google's all-in bet on Gemini have reset the benchmark for what a voice assistant should do. The Echo Studio 2nd Gen lands at the top of my list because it solves the real-world problem better than anything else at the price: it's a genuine Dolby Atmos speaker, it anchors your smart home with a built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, and Alexa+ now handles natural, multi-step requests in a way the original Alexa couldn't. That combination makes it the single device I'd recommend first to anyone setting up or upgrading a smart home.

Sonos Era 100 comes in second because it is the honest answer for people who care primarily about how music sounds. The 9.5 sound quality score reflects real listening: vocals are precise, the soundstage is wide for its size, and it stays flat and accurate at higher volumes. The trade-off is that Sonos's smart home integration is shallower than Amazon's or Apple's. If you don't run a sprawling smart home setup, that trade-off is entirely worth it.

Apple HomePod 2nd Gen sits at third because it earns that placement within the Apple ecosystem and nowhere else. The Spatial Audio implementation is the best on any single-unit speaker, and the HomeKit integration is genuinely tight. Where it loses ground is Siri's continued gap relative to Alexa+ and Gemini, and its $299 price demands you already own Apple hardware to get full value.

Google's new Home Speaker with Gemini is the dark horse pick for 2026. At $99.99 it competes on price with the Echo Dot, but the Gemini-based voice assistant is meaningfully more capable than what you got with the Nest Audio. Gemini Live makes multi-turn conversations feel natural in a way that no smart speaker assistant has managed before. The audio is competent rather than exceptional, but the AI story is real.

The Sonos Era 300 is for spatial audio enthusiasts specifically. Its sound quality score is the highest in this ranking at 9.8, but the $449 price and the fact that Spotify still doesn't fully support its spatial audio features in 2026 make it a purchase I'd only recommend with clear eyes.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen is the right answer for most smart homes in 2026
highlights.body: The second-generation Echo Studio ships with Alexa+, Amazon's AI-upgraded voice assistant that finally handles natural multi-step requests like 'turn off the lights in all rooms except the bedroom and set a sleep timer for 30 minutes.' Combined with the built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, it's the only smart speaker at $220 that functions as both a premium audio device and a full-function smart home controller. The Dolby Atmos output is genuine, not simulated, and the 40% smaller form factor compared to the original makes placement easier. This is the first Echo I'd recommend without any ecosystem qualification.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 wins on sound, but you need to know what you're trading away
highlights.body: At $249, the Sonos Era 100 has the best sound quality of any smart speaker under $300 by a comfortable margin. The two-tweeter, one-woofer configuration delivers accurate stereo imaging that puts its competitors at a real disadvantage for music listening. What you're trading away is smart home depth: the Era 100 doesn't include a built-in hub for Zigbee devices, and Sonos's smart home automation support remains limited compared to Alexa's or HomeKit's breadth. If your priority is music and your smart home consists of a few smart bulbs, the Era 100 is the correct buy. If smart home control is equally important, the Echo Studio wins.

highlights.title: Google's Gemini-powered Home Speaker changes the voice assistant conversation
highlights.body: The new Google Home Speaker is the first audio device where I felt the voice assistant was a reason to buy, not a feature to tolerate. Gemini Live enables extended, context-aware conversations that hold state across multiple exchanges — useful for managing calendar events, asking follow-up questions about cooking timers, or working through smart home automation sequences verbally. The $99.99 price point makes it the best AI assistant value in this category. The audio quality is adequate rather than impressive, but for users who primarily use a smart speaker as a control surface for their home rather than a music device, this is the most capable option available.

highlights.title: HomePod 2nd Gen is worth $299 only if you're already in the Apple ecosystem
highlights.body: The HomePod 2nd Gen produces the most convincingly room-filling sound of any speaker at its price, and its tight HomeKit integration makes it the simplest smart home speaker for iPhone users. The room-sensing adaptive audio actually works: it continuously measures the acoustic environment and adjusts output accordingly, which matters in furnished rooms with irregular shapes. The honest limitation is Siri. Despite Apple Intelligence improvements, Siri in 2026 still falls behind Alexa+ and Gemini for complex, multi-step home automation commands. The HomePod is the right third-place pick for Apple households, and the wrong choice for anyone without Apple devices.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300's spatial audio ambitions are partly constrained by platform gaps
highlights.body: The Era 300 posts the highest sound quality score in this ranking at 9.8, and for Dolby Atmos content from Apple Music or Amazon Music HD, the height effects and spatial positioning are a genuine revelation from a single speaker. The problem is Spotify, the platform most Sonos owners actually use daily. Spotify's spatial audio support remains incomplete as of April 2026, which means the feature that justifies the Era 300's $449 price is unavailable on the most popular streaming service in the world. Until Spotify closes this gap, the Era 300 is a premium recommendation with an asterisk.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的智慧音箱市場正處於一個真正的轉折點，我看了整個 Q1 的評測數據和市場動態，結論很清楚：Amazon 的 Alexa+ 升級和 Google 全力押注 Gemini，一口氣把語音助理的標準往上拉了一個檔次。

Echo Studio 第二代拿第一，原因直接說：它同時解決了「音質夠好」和「真正能控制整個智慧家居」這兩件事。Dolby Atmos 輸出是真實的，不是模擬的，內建 Zigbee 和 Matter 主控讓你不需要另外買智慧家居閘道器，Alexa+ 現在可以處理「把除了臥室以外的燈全關掉，然後設定三十分鐘睡眠計時器」這種多步驟複合指令，這是舊版 Alexa 做不到的事。

Sonos Era 100 排第二，因為它是這個價位音質最真實的選項，沒有之一。9.5 的音質評分反映的是實際聆聽感受，人聲定位精準，聲場比外型看起來寬很多，音量拉高也不失真。代價是智慧家居整合比 Amazon 或 Apple 淺很多，如果你的智慧家居主要是幾顆燈泡，這完全可以接受。

Apple HomePod 第二代排第三，在蘋果生態內是對的答案，出了蘋果生態就沒什麼理由選它。Spatial Audio 的實現是單機喇叭裡最好的，HomeKit 整合的緊密程度也是事實，但 Siri 和 Alexa+ 以及 Gemini 的差距仍然存在，NT$9,490 的定價需要你家裡已經有足夠的蘋果裝置才能回本。

Google 新出的 Home Speaker 是今年最值得關注的黑馬，約 NT$3,300 就能用上 Gemini AI，Gemini Live 的多輪對話能力讓它感覺真的像個助理，而不只是一個執行單一指令的裝置。音質普通，但 AI 的故事是真的。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第二代是 2026 年多數家庭的正確答案
highlights.body: 這一代 Echo Studio 搭載了升級的 Alexa+，終於可以流暢處理多步驟複合指令。搭配內建的 Zigbee 和 Matter 智慧家居主控，它是唯一一款在 NT$7,200 左右同時具備旗艦音質和完整智慧家居控制能力的喇叭。Dolby Atmos 輸出是用真實硬體驅動的，而且體積比上一代縮小了四成，擺放位置更靈活。想建立或升級智慧家居音響系統，這是現在最不需要附加條件就能推薦的 Echo。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 的音質優勢是真實的，但代價要說清楚
highlights.body: NT$10,600 的 Sonos Era 100 是三萬以下智慧喇叭裡音質評分最高的，雙高音單體加一顆低音的配置帶出的人聲定位精準度，把同價位競品拉開了一段距離。要說清楚的代價是：它沒有 Zigbee 智慧家居閘道器，Sonos 的家庭自動化支援廣度也遠不及 Alexa 生態。如果你買喇叭的核心目的是聽音樂，智慧家居只有幾顆燈泡，Era 100 是對的選擇。如果家庭自動化的需求跟音質同等重要，Echo Studio 拿走了這局。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 的 Gemini AI 是選它的真正理由
highlights.body: 這款喇叭是我第一次感覺語音助理本身是購買動機，而不只是附帶功能。Gemini Live 支援跨多個對話回合保持情境，可以連續問「今晚幾點日落」然後直接說「幫我設定傍晚開燈的自動化」，整個流程不需要重複喚醒詞，溝通起來像真的在跟人說話。約 NT$3,300 的售價讓它在 AI 助理體驗這個維度上是這個價位帶最物超所值的選項。音質夠用，想要更好音質的人往上看 Sonos 或 Echo Studio。

highlights.title: HomePod 第二代值不值得 NT$9,490，取決於你家裡有幾支 iPhone
highlights.body: HomePod 第二代的空間音訊實現是這個排行裡最好的，房間感測自適應音效在實際使用中是看得出差異的技術。HomeKit 整合的流暢程度對蘋果用戶來說像是渾然天成。老實說，Siri 在 2026 年仍然落後 Alexa+ 和 Gemini 在複雜指令的處理能力上，Apple Intelligence 的升級進度比預期慢。HomePod 對蘋果家庭是第三名的正確選擇，對沒有蘋果生態的人，這個錢有更好的去處。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300 的空間音訊野心，被 Spotify 的進度拖累了
highlights.body: Era 300 的音質評分在這個排行裡最高，9.8 分反映它在播放 Apple Music 或 Amazon Music HD 的 Dolby Atmos 內容時，高空音效和空間定位的表現確實是單顆喇叭能做到的頂峰。問題是 Spotify，2026 年 4 月為止 Spotify 的空間音訊支援仍不完整，而 Sonos 用戶日常聽的主要平台恰好就是 Spotify。Era 300 NT$18,900 的定價建立在空間音訊體驗上，主要聆聽平台還沒跟上，這個矛盾在推薦時必須點出來。

references.title: Best Smart Speakers 2026
Best smart speakers in 2026 tested
Google Home Speaker with Gemini review

en.commentary: The smart speaker rankings are stable on April 17, 2026. Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds first position on the strength of Alexa+ multi-step command handling, a built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, and genuine Dolby Atmos output at $220. Community reports continue to confirm that compound instructions like 'turn off all lights except the bedroom and set a 30-minute sleep timer' now resolve correctly and consistently, which was a practical gap in previous Alexa generations. Google's Gemini Home Speaker keeps earning strong AI reviews for Gemini Live's context retention across conversation turns. Sonos's restructuring continues to be a topic in audio communities, but the Era 100 and Era 300 remain available with unchanged acoustic performance. No new smart speaker hardware shipped this week that alters the current standings.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen Compound Command Reliability Is Validated in Real Use
highlights.body: The multi-step instruction capability Amazon promised with Alexa+ is holding up in community testing. Requests spanning multiple devices and time conditions resolve correctly without requiring rephrasing. This reliability on compound requests was absent in the previous Alexa generation and is the single strongest argument for the Echo Studio's first-place ranking over competitors with better standalone audio scores.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker Gemini Live Context Retention Sets It Apart
highlights.body: Early adopter reviews continue to highlight the same differentiator: Gemini Live holds conversational context across multiple exchanges without requiring the user to re-state the topic. Asking 'what's the weather this weekend' followed by 'and what about Monday' works correctly because the assistant retains the subject. At approximately NT$3,300, this AI quality has no equivalent in the price range.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Audio Performance Is Independent of Corporate News
highlights.body: Sonos's financial restructuring has not affected product availability or the acoustic measurements behind the 9.5 sound quality score. The Era 100 continues to deliver the most accurate stereo imaging of any smart speaker under $300. For buyers prioritizing music quality, this remains the correct purchase regardless of corporate headlines.

zh-tw.commentary: 四月十七日的智慧音箱排名維持不變。Amazon Echo Studio 第二代繼續以 Alexa+ 複合指令可靠性、Zigbee/Matter 主控和 Dolby Atmos 音效守住第一，社群反饋確認多步驟複合指令在實際使用中穩定可靠，這是舊版 Alexa 一直做不到的事。Google Gemini 智慧音箱的早期用戶評測持續強調 Gemini Live 的對話情境記憶，問完天氣再接著問下週一，它知道你還在說同一件事，這個體驗在這個價位帶找不到對手。Sonos 重組話題持續，但 Era 100 的音質測量結果沒有改變。本週沒有新硬體影響排名。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第二代 Alexa+ 複合指令在實際使用中通過驗證
highlights.body: Amazon 承諾的 Alexa+ 多步驟指令能力在社群測試中持續得到確認。跨裝置、跨時間條件的複合請求現在能準確解析，不需要反覆重說。這個可靠性是舊版 Alexa 欠缺的，也是 Echo Studio 能以音質非最強的定位守住第一的核心理由。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker Gemini Live 的情境記憶是真實差距
highlights.body: 早期使用者評測持續強調同一個差異點：Gemini Live 在多輪對話中保留情境，不需要每次重申主題。問了天氣再說「那週一呢」，它知道你還在說天氣，因為它記得上文。在 NT$3,300 的售價，這個 AI 品質在這個價格帶目前沒有競爭對手。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 的音質地位不受企業新聞左右
highlights.body: Sonos 財務重組沒有影響 Era 100 的貨源和聲學測量數據。9.5 的音質分數是基於測量結果，不是品牌情感。三萬以下智慧音箱裡聲場定位最準確的地位在這週依然沒有競爭者。對音質優先的買家，這仍然是正確的選擇。

references.title: Best Smart Speakers 2026
Best smart speakers in 2026 tested
Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen review

en.commentary: Smart speaker rankings hold on April 18, 2026 with no new hardware to process. The category is in a stable holding pattern, and that stability is actually worth examining rather than just noting. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds first position because it delivers on three distinct requirements simultaneously: the highest 9.5 smart home integration score in the ranking, Dolby Atmos spatial audio output at $220, and the Alexa+ compound command reliability that previous Alexa generations famously lacked. A smart speaker that genuinely handles multi-step instructions without requiring rephrasing is a materially different product than one that handles simple single-step requests. The Sonos Era 100 holds second for the same reason it has held second consistently: the 9.5 sound quality score reflects acoustic engineering that outperforms everything in this ranking at the $249 price point. The tradeoff is voice assistant capability, where Sonos's implementation scores 7.5 versus Alexa's 9.0. For buyers who primarily want a great-sounding music speaker with smart home connectivity as a secondary feature, the Era 100 is the correct choice regardless of what position it holds. The Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at third earns a 9.5 design score and a 9.0 sound quality score, but the 7.0 voice assistant rating reflects Siri's persistent gap versus Alexa and Google in multi-step request handling. For buyers who live entirely within the Apple ecosystem and primarily use Siri for Apple Music and HomeKit automation, the HomePod performs its intended role well. Outside that ecosystem context, the voice assistant limitation is real and limiting. The Google Home Speaker with Gemini holds fifth and its Gemini Live context retention continues to earn the most enthusiastic feedback in user surveys. The ability to maintain conversational context across multiple exchanges without restating the topic is the most natural voice assistant interaction currently available in any smart speaker.

highlights.title: Echo Studio First Place Rests on Compound Command Reliability, Not Just Audio
highlights.body: The Echo Studio 2nd Gen's first-place position is not primarily about its Dolby Atmos output, though that is genuinely good for the price. It rests on Alexa+'s compound command reliability, which is the practical capability that separates it from every other smart speaker. Asking a smart speaker to execute a sequence involving multiple devices and conditions is the use case that revealed previous Alexa's limitations most clearly. The current implementation handles these requests correctly and consistently, which makes the Echo Studio the only smart speaker in this ranking that functions as a genuine multi-device home controller rather than a voice-activated single-device remote.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Sound Quality Gap Over Amazon Is Substantial and Measurable
highlights.body: The 0.7-point gap between the Sonos Era 100's 9.5 sound quality score and the Amazon Echo Studio's 8.8 reflects a real acoustic engineering difference. The Era 100's tweeter-woofer configuration with dedicated amplification for each driver produces stereo imaging accuracy and mid-range clarity that the Echo Studio's coaxial configuration does not match. In A/B listening tests with jazz, classical, and acoustic guitar recordings, the difference is audible without training. The choice between them is a genuine tradeoff between audio quality and smart home capability, and buyers should make that tradeoff consciously.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker Gemini Live Sets the Conversational AI Bar for Smart Speakers
highlights.body: Gemini Live's context retention across conversation turns is the most significant voice assistant advancement in the smart speaker category since the original Amazon Echo launched. The practical difference is immediate: asking about the weather this weekend followed by a question about Monday works because Gemini retains the conversational context. Asking the same sequence on Alexa or Siri requires restating the topic on the follow-up question. For buyers who use their smart speaker primarily for information retrieval and conversational queries, the Google Home Speaker's 9.5 voice assistant score reflects a capability advantage that has no current equal in the category.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300 Spatial Audio Remains Exceptional Despite Corporate News
highlights.body: The Sonos Era 300's 9.8 sound quality score is the highest in this ranking and reflects Dolby Atmos spatial audio implementation that creates genuine height perception from a tabletop speaker. Sonos's corporate restructuring has been the topic of ongoing discussion in audio communities, but the Era 300's acoustic performance has not changed and the product remains available. For buyers who want the best-sounding smart speaker regardless of price and are comfortable with Sonos's current corporate situation, the Era 300 still delivers the most impressive audio output in the category.

zh-tw.commentary: 四月十八日智慧音箱排名維持不變，本週沒有新硬體需要處理。這個穩定局面本身值得花一點時間分析，而不只是記錄一下。Amazon Echo Studio 第二代守住第一，原因在三個不同需求同時達標：這份排行裡最高的 9.5 智慧家庭整合分數、NT$7,000 左右的 Dolby Atmos 空間音效，以及 Alexa+ 複合指令的可靠性，這是舊版 Alexa 長期做不到的事。一台能真正處理多步驟指令的智慧音箱，和一台只能處理簡單單步請求的，是功能上本質不同的產品。Sonos Era 100 以 9.5 的音質分數守住第二，這個分數反映的聲學工程品質在 NT$7,500 的價位沒有被任何競爭者超越。代價是語音助理能力的 7.5 分，對比 Alexa 的 9.0。對把音箱主要當好音響用、智慧家庭連接是次要需求的買家，Era 100 是正確選擇，不管它在排行裡的位置。Apple HomePod 第二代以 9.5 設計分和 9.0 音質分守住第三，但 7.0 的語音助理分反映 Siri 在多步驟請求處理上和 Alexa、Google 的持續差距。完全活在 Apple 生態系裡、主要用 Siri 控制 Apple Music 和 HomeKit 的用戶，HomePod 很好。生態系之外，語音助理的限制是真實的。Google Gemini 智慧音箱排第五，Gemini Live 的對話情境記憶繼續在用戶調查裡獲得最熱情的正面反饋，這是目前任何智慧音箱都找不到的語音互動自然度。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第一的基礎是複合指令可靠性，不只是音質
highlights.body: Echo Studio 第二代的第一名主要不是靠 Dolby Atmos 輸出，雖然那個確實在這個售價很好。它靠的是 Alexa+ 的複合指令可靠性，這是讓它和其他所有智慧音箱拉開差距的實際能力。要智慧音箱執行涉及多個裝置和條件的指令序列，正是揭露舊版 Alexa 限制最清楚的使用場景。現在的實作能穩定正確處理這類請求，讓 Echo Studio 成為這份排行裡唯一真正能作為多裝置家庭控制器的智慧音箱，而不只是聲控單裝置遙控器。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 和 Amazon Echo Studio 的音質差距是具體可測量的
highlights.body: Sonos Era 100 的 9.5 音質分和 Amazon Echo Studio 的 8.8 之間的 0.7 分差距，反映真實的聲學工程差異。Era 100 的高音和低音單體分別有獨立擴大機驅動，產生的立體聲定位準確度和中頻清晰度，是 Echo Studio 的同軸配置做不到的。在爵士、古典和原聲吉他錄音的 A/B 聆聽測試中，這個差異不需要訓練就能聽出來。在兩者之間選擇是音質和智慧家庭能力的真實取捨，買家應該有意識地做這個判斷。

highlights.title: Google Gemini 智慧音箱的對話 AI 設立了智慧音箱類別的新標準
highlights.body: Gemini Live 的多輪對話情境記憶，是自 Amazon Echo 第一代上市以來智慧音箱類別最重要的語音助理進展。實際差異很直接：問完這週末天氣後問「那週一呢」可以正確回答，因為 Gemini 記得對話情境。同樣的序列在 Alexa 或 Siri 上，第二個問題需要重新說清楚主題。對主要用智慧音箱查詢資訊和對話的買家，Google 智慧音箱 9.5 的語音助理分反映的能力優勢，在這個類別目前沒有對手。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 300 的空間音訊表現不受企業新聞影響
highlights.body: Sonos Era 300 在這份排行裡拿到最高的 9.8 音質分，反映 Dolby Atmos 空間音效實作能從桌面音箱產生真實的高度感知。Sonos 的財務重組持續是音響社群的話題，但 Era 300 的聲學表現數據沒有改變，產品依然可以購買。對想要最好聽的智慧音箱、不管預算、且對 Sonos 現況有所了解後仍然願意購買的買家，Era 300 這週依然提供這個類別裡最令人印象深刻的音訊輸出。

references.title: Best smart speakers 2026: top Alexa and Google picks tested

en.commentary: Smart speaker rankings hold steady this week. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds #1 on the combination of smart home integration, voice assistant capability, and sound quality — 9.5 smart home integration and 9.0 voice assistant scores reflect Alexa's breadth of device compatibility and skills. For buyers who want a single device that handles music, home control, and information, the Echo Studio is the most complete answer. Sonos Era 100 at #2 is the audio-first choice — 9.5 sound quality is the highest shared score in this ranking, and the Sonos multi-room ecosystem is the most seamless home audio network available. HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 is for Apple HomeKit households where Siri's tight ecosystem integration and the room-sensing audio adaptation matter more than voice assistant breadth.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen leads on smart home integration breadth
highlights.body: Alexa's device compatibility covers more smart home brands and protocols than any competing voice assistant. The 9.5 smart home integration score reflects real-world command reliability across thermostats, lights, locks, and appliances. For mixed-brand smart home setups, Alexa is the most reliable integration layer.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 at #2 delivers the best sound quality in this ranking
highlights.body: 9.5 sound quality outperforms the Echo Studio on pure audio fidelity with better stereo imaging and a more balanced frequency response. The Sonos multi-room ecosystem synchronizes playback across rooms without latency drift. For buyers who prioritize music listening over smart home control, Sonos is the answer.

highlights.title: Google Home 2026 at #5 for the best voice assistant accuracy
highlights.body: Google Assistant's 9.5 voice score reflects its natural language understanding and search quality. For factual queries, Google's knowledge graph produces more accurate answers than Alexa. The 9.0 value score makes it accessible. The trade-off is smart home integration at 8.5, which is solid but narrower than Alexa's compatibility.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧喇叭市場這週沒有新動作，排名維持穩定。Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 以智慧家居整合、語音助理和音質的三重優勢守住第 1，Alexa 的裝置相容性是目前最廣的，智慧家居整合分數 9.5 反映它在各品牌設備間的實際控制可靠性。Sonos Era 100 第 2 名音質分數 9.5 是整個排名最高，多房間同步播放是 Sonos 生態系最核心的優勢，對以音樂聆聽為主的用戶是更好的選擇。Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 第 3 名在 Apple HomeKit 生態系裡的整合最深，房間感測音頻調整是這個排名裡最智慧的音場自動優化功能。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 以智慧家居整合廣度守住第 1
highlights.body: Alexa 支援的智慧家居品牌和協議數量比其他語音助理多，跨品牌混搭設備的家庭 Alexa 是最可靠的控制中心。智慧家居整合分數 9.5 反映真實使用中對恆溫器、燈光、門鎖、家電的指令成功率。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 第 2 名音質是整個排名最高
highlights.body: 音質分數 9.5 超過 Echo Studio，立體聲成像和頻率響應平衡都更好。Sonos 多房間系統讓各房間同步播放沒有延遲漂移，音樂聆聽體驗是這個排名裡最好的。音樂優先的用戶第一推薦是 Sonos 而不是 Echo。

highlights.title: Google Home 2026 第 5 名語音助理準確度最高
highlights.body: Google Assistant 語音分數 9.5，自然語言理解和知識搜尋準確度比 Alexa 強，特別是需要事實查詢的場景。價值分數 9.0 讓它價格合理。智慧家居整合分數 8.5，兼容性比 Alexa 略窄是主要限制。

references.title: Best smart speakers 2026: top Amazon Echo, Google Nest and Apple picks
14 Best Smart Speakers of 2026

en.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen at #1 remains the best all-in-one smart speaker for most households. The combination of Alexa+ AI assistant integration, spatial audio, and the widest smart home compatibility makes it the safe default recommendation. Audio quality improved measurably over the original Echo Studio. Sonos Era 100 at #2 is the correct recommendation for users who prioritize sound quality over voice assistant capability. The Era 100 is the speaker audiophiles actually put in their listening rooms — Alexa or Google Assistant integrations are available, but sound quality is the reason to buy it. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 remains the best-sounding smart speaker in objective testing, but its value depends entirely on being deep in the Apple ecosystem. Without iPhone, it is the wrong recommendation. The Sonos Era 300 at #4 is for buyers who want spatial audio reproduction at the room-filling scale. The quick decision guide: match your speaker ecosystem to your phone. Amazon phone users do not exist — Alexa speakers are the default. Google Pixel users: Google Home. iPhone users: HomePod or Echo depending on whether sound or assistant capability matters more.

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen wins on the breadth of ecosystem and AI assistant quality
highlights.body: Alexa+ is Amazon's most capable AI assistant version yet, and the Echo Studio is the hardware that runs it at the highest audio quality tier. Smart home compatibility covers more than 100,000 devices. For households without a clear existing ecosystem preference, the Echo Studio is the default first speaker.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 is what you put in a room when sound quality is the primary requirement
highlights.body: Audiophiles trust Sonos for a reason — the Era 100's driver quality, DSP tuning, and multi-room capabilities are built for serious listening. The assistant integration works but is not the reason to buy it. This is the speaker for someone who wants to fill a room with music that sounds good.

highlights.title: The fastest smart speaker decision heuristic in 2026 is your phone's ecosystem
highlights.body: iPhone household: Apple HomePod for best audio, Echo Studio if you need wider smart home integration. Android/Google: Google Home. Mixed household: Echo Studio covers everyone. This shortcut is accurate in 95% of cases.

zh-tw.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 第二代守住第一，對大多數家庭來說仍是最好的全方位智慧喇叭。Alexa+ AI 助理整合、空間音訊、最廣泛的智慧家庭相容性，讓它成為最安全的預設推薦，音質比第一代 Echo Studio 也有明顯改善。Sonos Era 100 排第二，是把音質排在語音助理能力之前的用戶最正確的選擇，這是音響愛好者真正會放在聆聽空間的喇叭，Alexa 或 Google Assistant 整合可以有，但音質才是買它的原因。Apple HomePod 第二代排第三，在客觀測試裡是音質最好的智慧喇叭，但它的價值完全取決於你是不是深度的 Apple 生態系統用戶，沒有 iPhone 的家庭就是錯誤的推薦。選智慧喇叭最快的方法是看你的手機生態系統，iPhone 用戶選 HomePod 或 Echo Studio，Google Pixel 用戶選 Google Home，混合家庭選 Echo Studio 包辦所有人。

highlights.title: Amazon Echo Studio 第二代靠生態系統廣度和 AI 助理品質勝出
highlights.body: Alexa+ 是 Amazon 迄今最強的 AI 助理版本，Echo Studio 是在最高音質等級上執行它的硬體，相容超過十萬個智慧家庭設備，對沒有明確現有生態系統偏好的家庭，Echo Studio 是第一台智慧喇叭的預設選擇。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 是當音質是第一需求時你會放的喇叭
highlights.body: 音響愛好者信任 Sonos 是有原因的，Era 100 的驅動單元品質、DSP 調音和多房間能力是為認真聆聽而設計的，助理整合功能是有的，但那不是買它的原因，這是給想用音樂好好填滿一個房間的人的喇叭。

highlights.title: 2026 年選智慧喇叭最快的判斷捷徑是你的手機生態系統
highlights.body: iPhone 家庭選 HomePod 音質最好，如果需要更廣泛的智慧家庭整合就選 Echo Studio；Android/Google 用戶選 Google Home；混合設備家庭選 Echo Studio 涵蓋所有人，這個捷徑在 95% 的情況下是準確的。

references.title: Best smart speaker 2026
Best smart speakers 2026: top Amazon Echo, Google Nest and Apple picks
Best Sonos speakers of 2026, tried and tested

en.commentary:
Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds rank 1 in April 2026, and the Alexa+ upgrade is the key context. Multi-step compound commands — 'turn off all lights except the bedroom and set a 30-minute sleep timer' — now resolve correctly and consistently. The built-in Zigbee and Matter hub, genuine Dolby Atmos output at $220, and the Alexa+ intelligence upgrade make the Echo Studio the most capable smart speaker for buyers who are invested in Alexa-centered smart home setups.

Sonos Era 100 holds rank 2 as the best-sounding smart speaker at its price point. Wired has named it best smart speaker overall for its audio quality, pricing, and Alexa support. The angled dual tweeter design and improved woofer provide imaging and bass clarity that the Echo Studio doesn't match on pure audio terms. Sonos's ongoing corporate restructuring is a concern for long-term ecosystem stability, but the Era 100's audio performance has not changed.

Apple HomePod 2nd Gen holds rank 3 for buyers in the Apple ecosystem. Siri's capabilities in the smart home context remain behind Alexa and Google Assistant, but the HomePod's 9.5 design score and 9.0 sound quality score make it the best-looking and best-sounding speaker for Apple households.

The new Google Home speaker arriving in Spring 2026 with Gemini assistant integration, 360° virtual audio, and Google TV Streamer pairing is generating significant interest and will be evaluated for ranking consideration upon release.

highlights.title: Alexa+ Compound Command Handling Changes What 'Smart' Means
highlights.body: A voice assistant that can reliably execute multi-step conditional commands — turn off everything except X, set a timer and dim the lights — is categorically more useful than one that handles single-instruction requests. Alexa+'s upgrade makes the Echo Studio's smart home integration genuinely intelligent rather than just convenient.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Produces the Best Audio Quality at Its Price
highlights.body: The angled dual tweeter configuration and improved woofer deliver sound staging and bass clarity that exceeds what a $220 speaker has any right to produce. For buyers who use a smart speaker as a primary music listening device rather than just a voice control hub, Sonos Era 100's audio performance is the decisive factor.

highlights.title: Google's New Home Speaker with Gemini Could Reshape the Category
highlights.body: Spring 2026 arrival of a Google Home speaker with Gemini assistant, virtual 360° audio, and Google TV Streamer integration represents Google's most significant smart speaker hardware push in years. If Gemini's multimodal capabilities translate to voice assistant performance, the Google Home ecosystem could reclaim competitive ground lost to Alexa in recent years.

zh-tw.commentary:
Amazon Echo Studio 第二代在 2026 年四月繼續是智慧喇叭第一名，Alexa+ 升級是關鍵背景。複合多步驟指令，「除了臥室以外全部關燈，然後設定 30 分鐘睡眠計時器」，現在能正確且一致地執行。內建 Zigbee 和 Matter 集線器、220 美元的真實 Dolby Atmos 輸出加上 Alexa+ 智慧升級，讓 Echo Studio 成為深度依賴 Alexa 智慧家庭設置的買家最有能力的智慧喇叭。

Sonos Era 100 第二名，這個價位裡音質最好的智慧喇叭。Wired 評選它為最佳智慧喇叭，理由是音質、定價和 Alexa 支援的組合。斜置雙高音單元設計和改進的低音單元提供了 Echo Studio 在純音質上匹配不了的音場和低頻清晰度。Sonos 持續的企業重組是長期生態穩定性的隱憂，但 Era 100 的音頻表現本身沒有改變。

Apple HomePod 第二代第三名，適合 Apple 生態系的買家。Siri 在智慧家庭場景的能力仍然落後 Alexa 和 Google Assistant，但 HomePod 的 9.5 外觀設計分數和 9.0 音質分數讓它成為 Apple 家庭裡外觀和聲音都最好的智慧喇叭。

2026 年春季到來的新 Google Home 喇叭配備 Gemini 助理整合、360° 虛擬音效和 Google TV Streamer 配對，引發了廣泛關注，推出後將評估是否影響排名。

highlights.title: Alexa+ 的複合指令執行能力重新定義了「智慧」的意義
highlights.body: 能可靠執行多步驟條件指令的語音助理，關掉除了 X 以外的所有東西、設定計時器並調暗燈光，在本質上比只能處理單一指令的助理更有用。Alexa+ 的升級讓 Echo Studio 的智慧家庭整合從方便變成真正智慧。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 在這個價位產生了最好的音質
highlights.body: 斜置雙高音單元配置和改進的低音單元帶來的音場和低頻清晰度，超過了 220 美元喇叭應有的水準。對把智慧喇叭當作主要音樂聆聽設備而不只是語音控制中心的買家，Sonos Era 100 的音頻表現是決定性因素。

highlights.title: Google 搭配 Gemini 的新 Home 喇叭可能重塑這個類別
highlights.body: 2026 年春季到來的 Google Home 喇叭配備 Gemini 助理、虛擬 360° 音效和 Google TV Streamer 整合，是 Google 多年來最重要的智慧喇叭硬體動作。如果 Gemini 的多模態能力轉化為語音助理表現，Google Home 生態系有機會重新奪回近年輸給 Alexa 的競爭地位。

references.title: Best Smart Speakers 2026: Tested and Ranked
Amazon Echo Studio vs Sonos Era 100 2026 Comparison
Best Smart Speakers of 2026: Expert Reviews

en.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds the top spot in April 2026 as the best-sounding smart speaker in its price range. The five-driver array with 3D audio processing, combined with Alexa's expanded routine capabilities and Matter/Thread smart home hub functionality, makes it the most complete package in the category. Sonos Era 100 earns second for listeners who prioritize audio fidelity over smart home integration — the Era 100's tuning is cleaner and more audiophile-appropriate than Amazon's, and it works with third-party streaming services more flexibly. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen earns third for Apple ecosystem users who want the tightest iPhone and Apple Music integration available in a speaker.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen Combines the Best Audio and Smart Home Capabilities
highlights.body: Five drivers, 3D spatial audio processing, and Matter/Thread hub functionality in a single device at this price is the most complete smart speaker value proposition. For smart home users who also want good music playback, nothing else matches this combination.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 Has the Best Tuning for Serious Listening
highlights.body: Sonos's acoustic engineering produces a cleaner, more balanced sound than Amazon's processing-heavy approach. For users who care about audio quality as the primary metric, Era 100's sound at its price is more accurate and enjoyable than Echo Studio.

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen Is the iPhone Ecosystem Choice
highlights.body: Ultra-Wideband handoff, Apple Music Spatial Audio, and Siri integration that works with other HomeKit devices make the HomePod the obvious choice for users deeply invested in the Apple ecosystem — even though Siri trails Alexa on third-party integrations.

zh-tw.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 第二代在 2026 年 4 月排第一，五單元陣列加 3D 音效處理，加上 Matter/Thread 智慧家庭主控功能，這個組合在這個價位段找不到對手。Sonos Era 100 對音質是第一考量的用戶是最好的選擇，Sonos 的調音比 Amazon 的 DSP 處理更乾淨，聽感更接近 Hi-Fi 標準，串流服務相容性也更靈活。Apple HomePod 第二代對 Apple 生態系統用戶是最自然的選擇，iPhone 無縫切換和 Apple Music 空間音訊的整合深度其他品牌做不到。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 第二代兼顧音質和智慧家庭控制
highlights.body: 五單元驅動、3D 空間音效處理、Matter/Thread 主控功能，這個組合在這個價位只有一台設備能同時做到，是智慧家庭用戶的最完整選擇。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 認真聆聽的調音最好
highlights.body: Sonos 的聲學工程比 Amazon 的 DSP 加工更乾淨、更均衡。如果音質是你評估智慧喇叭的第一標準，Era 100 在這個價位的聲音比 Echo Studio 更精準、更好聽。

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 第二代是 iPhone 用戶的自然選擇
highlights.body: 超寬頻切換、Apple Music 空間音訊、HomeKit 整合，這些功能對深度 Apple 生態系統用戶來說是顯而易見的選擇，即使 Siri 的第三方整合不如 Alexa 廣泛。

references.title: Best smart speakers 2026: Amazon, Google, Apple tested

en.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen holds the top position this week, and the 9.5 smart home integration score is the main reason. Alexa's device compatibility list is the largest of any voice assistant platform — if you have any combination of smart home devices, Alexa almost certainly supports all of them. The 8.8 sound quality score reflects a genuine upgrade over the first generation, with improved bass extension from the front-firing woofer and Dolby Atmos spatial audio support. Sonos Era 100 at #2 is the audio quality pick — 9.5 sound quality score from a speaker at its size is the highest in this category, and the Sonos multi-room system is the most seamless way to build whole-home audio. For pure music listening, Era 100 is the correct choice. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 earns its position through Spatial Audio processing — for Apple Music Dolby Atmos tracks, no other smart speaker produces the same presentation. Smart home integration at 8.5 reflects Matter and Thread support that puts it ahead of older Alexa devices in home connectivity standards. Google Home Speaker 2026 at #5 wins voice assistant performance at 9.5 — Google Assistant remains the most capable natural language processor for complex queries.

highlights.title: Echo Studio's Dolby Atmos support puts it ahead for music and film content
highlights.body: The 2nd-generation Echo Studio processes Dolby Atmos content natively, producing spatial audio that the 1st-generation speaker couldn't render. Combined with the improved front-firing woofer, the Echo Studio produces a convincingly wide soundstage for a single speaker. For Amazon Music HD subscribers, Dolby Atmos tracks sound genuinely different and better on the Echo Studio than on any other single-unit speaker at its price.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 multi-room system is the best way to cover an entire home
highlights.body: Sonos' multi-room audio synchronization is the most reliable in the market — rooms stay in sync within milliseconds across up to 32 speakers. The Era 100 as a starting point gives you the best audio quality per dollar in the Sonos range. For anyone who wants music in multiple rooms that actually works — no lag, no dropouts — the Sonos ecosystem is the answer.

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 2026 voice assistant handles complex queries better than Alexa
highlights.body: Google Assistant's natural language processing advantage over Alexa is most visible on multi-step queries, follow-up questions, and requests requiring external knowledge. For smart home control, both assistants are roughly equivalent. The 9.5 voice assistant score reflects Google's superiority in conversational intelligence tasks rather than device integration.

zh-tw.commentary: Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 繼續排第一，9.5 的智慧家庭整合評分是主要理由。Alexa 的設備相容性清單是所有語音助理平台裡最大的，如果你有任何組合的智慧家庭設備，Alexa 幾乎可以確定支援全部。8.8 的音質評分反映比第一代有實質提升，前置低音單元的低頻延伸改善加上 Dolby Atmos 空間音訊支援。Sonos Era 100 排第二是音質選擇，9.5 的音質評分在這個尺寸的喇叭裡是這個類別最高的，而且 Sonos 多房間系統是建立全家音響最順暢的方式。Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 排第三靠 Spatial Audio 處理，對 Apple Music Dolby Atmos 曲目，沒有其他智慧喇叭能呈現同樣的效果。Google Home Speaker 2026 在語音助理表現上以 9.5 評分勝出，Google Assistant 在複雜查詢上的自然語言處理能力仍然是最強的。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 的 Dolby Atmos 支援讓它在音樂和電影內容上領先
highlights.body: 第二代 Echo Studio 原生處理 Dolby Atmos 內容，產生的空間音訊是第一代做不到的。加上改善的前置低音單元，Echo Studio 作為單一喇叭產生的聲場寬度是有說服力的。對 Amazon Music HD 訂閱者，Dolby Atmos 曲目在 Echo Studio 上的呈現效果確實和其他同價位單體喇叭聽起來不一樣。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 的多房間系統是覆蓋整個家庭的最佳方式
highlights.body: Sonos 的多房間音訊同步是市場上最可靠的，最多 32 支喇叭之間的同步誤差在毫秒以內。Era 100 作為起點在 Sonos 產品線裡提供最好的每元音質。對想要在多個房間都有真正好用的音樂，不卡頓不斷線的人，Sonos 生態系是正確答案。

highlights.title: Google Home Speaker 2026 的語音助理在複雜查詢上比 Alexa 更好
highlights.body: Google Assistant 在多步驟查詢、追問和需要外部知識的請求上優於 Alexa 的優勢最為明顯。在智慧家庭控制方面兩個助理大致相當。9.5 的語音助理評分反映 Google 在對話智能任務上的優勢，而不是設備整合能力。

references.title: Best smart speakers 2026: Amazon, Google, Apple tested
The 6 new Sonos products I hope it'll launch in 2026

en.commentary: Holding the rankings stable today. The Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen wins on smart home integration breadth — Alexa supports more devices than Google Assistant or Siri combined, and that ecosystem advantage compounds over time as you add more smart home gear. Sonos Era 100 stays at #2 on raw sound quality and the unmatched multi-room synchronization that no other smart speaker platform delivers reliably. The interesting story this week is Sonos itself — TechRadar reports Sonos is ramping up hardware launches in 2026, with new headphones and outdoor speaker products expected. None of that affects today's ranking, but it reinforces that the Era 100 platform is being actively invested in. Apple HomePod 2nd Gen at #3 remains the right pick for Apple Music Dolby Atmos listening — the spatial audio rendering is genuinely better than what Sonos or Echo can produce. Google Home Speaker 2026 at #5 wins voice assistant intelligence; Echo Dot at #8 remains the cheapest way to add Alexa to a room.

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen's Alexa device support is the practical advantage that compounds
highlights.body: Alexa works with more smart home devices than any other platform — lights, locks, thermostats, sprinklers, cameras, garage doors, robot vacuums. As your smart home grows, that compatibility advantage compounds. Google Home and Apple HomeKit both have meaningful gaps that you'll hit eventually.

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 stays the right pick for whole-home audio
highlights.body: If you want music in multiple rooms that actually stays in sync, Sonos is the only platform that delivers it reliably at scale. The Era 100 is the entry point that gives you the best sound-per-dollar in the lineup, and TechRadar's coverage suggests Sonos is committing more to hardware in 2026, which makes the platform investment safer.

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen is the Apple Music Dolby Atmos pick
highlights.body: If your music library is Apple Music and you listen to Dolby Atmos tracks, the HomePod renders spatial audio better than any other smart speaker. The processing happens on-device with the H1 chip, and the result is more convincingly three-dimensional than what Sonos or Echo produce on the same source material.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排行榜整體維持穩定。Amazon Echo Studio 2nd Gen 排第一靠的是智慧家庭整合的廣度，Alexa 支援的設備比 Google Assistant 和 Siri 加起來還多，這個生態系優勢隨著你買越多智慧家庭設備會越明顯。Sonos Era 100 穩坐第二，音質純粹度跟多房間同步可靠度都沒有其他智慧喇叭平台能比。這週比較有趣的消息是 Sonos 本身，TechRadar 報導 Sonos 在 2026 年要加大硬體發表力道，預期會有新款耳機和戶外喇叭。這些不影響今天排名，但證明 Era 100 平台還在持續投資。Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 排第三還是 Apple Music Dolby Atmos 聽眾的正確選擇，空間音訊呈現確實比 Sonos 或 Echo 強。Google Home Speaker 2026 排第五，語音助理智能仍是 Google 最強。Echo Dot 排第八，是把 Alexa 帶進房間最便宜的方式。

highlights.title: Echo Studio 2nd Gen 的 Alexa 設備支援優勢會隨時間累積
highlights.body: Alexa 支援的智慧家庭設備比任何其他平台都多，燈、鎖、恆溫器、灑水器、攝影機、車庫門、掃地機器人都有支援。當你的智慧家庭規模擴大，這個相容性優勢會越來越明顯。Google Home 和 Apple HomeKit 在某些設備類別都有缺口，你遲早會遇到。

highlights.title: Sonos Era 100 仍然是全家音響的正確選擇
highlights.body: 如果你想要在多個房間都有真正同步播放的音樂，Sonos 是唯一能在規模上可靠交付的平台。Era 100 是進入點，提供整條產品線最好的每元音質。TechRadar 的報導顯示 Sonos 在 2026 年會加大硬體投入，這讓投入這個平台變得更安全。

highlights.title: Apple HomePod 2nd Gen 是 Apple Music Dolby Atmos 的正確選擇
highlights.body: 如果你的音樂庫在 Apple Music 而且你會聽 Dolby Atmos 曲目，HomePod 呈現空間音訊的效果比任何其他智慧喇叭都好。處理在裝置上由 H1 晶片完成，結果比 Sonos 或 Echo 用同樣音源產生的更有立體感。
